Farcana

IGO

Farcana is a third-person team ability shooter set in a mesmerizing Sci-Fi landscape. It emphasizes fast-paced gameplay, where weapons and the strategic use of characters' tactical and defensive abilities determine the outcome of matches.

PLEXUS is a cross-chain liquidity aggregator and middleware infrastructure that combines liquidity from dexes and bridges , across all chains. It enables users and companies to transfer tokens at the fastest and most optimal price between chains.

Openfabric AI

Openfabric AI is a decentralized Layer 1 AI protocol for building and connecting AI applications where we have harnessed the power of blockchain, advanced cryptography, and novel infrastructure to create a new foundation for AI-Apps. In our ecosystem, everyone has quick, easy, low-cost, and hassle-free access to powerful AIs.

Klubcoin

Klubcoin is a Web3 music platform powered by the utility token $KLUB - designed to meet the unique demands of the electronic music industry. Backed by some of the biggest clubs, events, restaurants, festivals and more, Klubcoin offers perks such as the ability to buy tickets, merchandise, drinks, access to sold out events, tipping as well as money-can’t-buy experiences in more than 100+ venues globally. Partners include Amnesia Ibiza, Bootshaus, DJ Mag, Eden Ibiza and more.

SOIL

Soil is a blockchain-based lending protocol that bridges the gap between traditional finance and the crypto world, reshaping corporate debt and fixed-income investments. It is a debt marketplace where established companies can obtain financing, and crypto investors can lend their stablecoins to earn yield derived from Real World Assets that exist off-chain.

DexCheck (Public)

DexCheck is revolutionizing crypto trading through its unique, AI-boosted analytics platform. It offers real-time insights into crypto and NFT markets, making blockchain analysis intuitive and accessible even for beginners.

Solidus AI Tech

Solidus has successfully constructed an environmentally conscious, state-of-the-art High-Performance Computing (HPC) Data Centre spanning over 8,000 square feet. This facility is strategically situated in a highly secure European location. In conjunction with this remarkable achievement, Solidus is poised to unveil the world's pioneering deflationary Artificial Intelligence token, known as AITECH.

SophiaVerse

SophiaVerse is a Web3 AI / Metaverse project that aims to bring the renowned Sophia Robot to humanoid sentience. It is a collaboration between Hanson Robotics and the SingularityNet Foundation that has been long in the making and will see many of the ecosystem projects coming together to create a virtual playground with one goal… Sentient Superintelligence.

Cogito Protocol offers a decentralized and AI-driven tracercoin - a stablecoin uncorrelated to fiat currencies. It is a spin-off from SingularityNET (AGIX).

How To Buy $SFUND

Watch Videos

How To Join The Web3 Gaming Revolution With Us

Only 3 steps are needed for you to start enjoying all the advantages of Seedify

Purchase $SFUND Tokens

$SFUND is Seedify's token that enables its holders to participate in IGOs, IDOs, INOs, stake and farm for passive income

Stake or Farm your $SFUND

Add your $SFUND to one of our staking or farming pools and earn passive income

Start Now

Complete KYC

It's a simple step to ensure your participation in our IDOs and IGOs (not necessary for INOs)

Register

You’re all set!

Now you can participate in the sales for tokens and NFTs of the best blockchain projects

Seed Staking
What is Seedify?
Seedify is a leading incubator and launchpad for Web3 projects, which boosts top-tier blockchain initiatives, providing support in several fronts. Read more.
How does the Launchpad work?
In this article we want to provide you answers to questions that you may have in mind, to help you understand everything about Seedify.fund Launchpad better. Read more.
Are you a web3 game studio looking to get incubated or launched by Seedify?
Apply now

Seedify is a Web3 gaming-focused Incubator and Launchpad. By staking $SFUND, you gain eligibility to purchase game tokens ahead of others, giving you a strategic advantage in the Web3 gaming landscape.
